arts.ttl: I idolised David Beckham and Man United - now I want to ruin Ruben Amorim's Old Trafford debut
arts.sum: United's Europa League clash with Bodo/Glimt will mean more than most to one opposition player

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has a Manchester United problem Erik ten Hag rarely had to face
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim could find it challenging to select his starting XI for Thursday night's Europa League clash with Bodo/Glimt.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Bruno Fernandes sends warning as club receive timely injury boost
arts.sum: Manchester United take on Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League as Ruben Amorim goes in search of his first win in the Red Devils' hotseat and manages at Old Trafford for the first time

arts.ttl: The five key issues Ruben Amorim must fix at Man United as he promises his players will 'suffer'
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Old Trafford will welcome Ruben Amorim for his first home game on Thursday, but don't expect Man United's new head coach to get carried away on a wave of emotion.

arts.ttl: When is Arsenal - Manchester United? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Arsenal - Manchester United will be played on Wednesday December 4 at Emirates Stadium with kick off at 3:15 p.m. ET / 9:15 a.m. PT . Under new coach Ruben Amorim Manchester United will try to turn things around after the horrible management of Erik ten Hag. The team comes to this game with three wins, two draws, in their last five games.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Bodo/Glimt: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man Utd face Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League on Thursday evening at Old Trafford. Preview includes team news, how to watch and more.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy new Leicester City manager: Former Manchester United boss to replace Steve Cooper
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy is set to become the new Leicester City manager and replace Steve Cooper after positive talks were held with the former Manchester United boss.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans criticise 'offensive' ticket price rise
arts.sum: Supporter groups accuse Manchester United of exploiting their fans after taking a mid-season decision to raise matchday ticket prices.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim calls out FIVE Man Utd stars over ongoing issue - "Of course there is concern"
arts.sum: Manchester United have struggled for goals all season and Ruben Amorim has acknowledged it as a problem and called upon the likes of Marcus Rashford and Bruno Fernandes to fix it

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans left furious as club announce ticket price hike and remove concessions
arts.sum: Manchester United owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe and Ineos have come under fire from support groups after it was announced the club had raised ticket prices and axed concessions
